scenes.narration: GATE 2026 mein Computer Networks ke 8-10 marks pakke. Padh lo abhi.
Without understanding Computer Networks, systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of Computer Networks like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of Computer Networks: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of Computer Networks: fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use Computer Networks to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: Computer Networks solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
